hero.label: Boutique digital craftsmanship — Poznań
hero.heading: Engineering meets art.
hero.description: We are a boutique studio. We combine advanced software architecture with uncompromising design. We transform complex problems into simple, beautiful products.

0.title: Architecture & AI
0.label: systems
0.desc: We design high-performance, scalable web platforms and integrate artificial intelligence systems. Custom, clean code without technical debt.

1.title: Art Direction
1.label: art direction
1.desc: We craft visual brand identities that leave a lasting impression. From rigorous typographic systems to professional photography and color grading.

2.title: Experience Design
2.label: interfaces
2.desc: We create minimalist and intuitive interfaces. We combine analytical precision with an obsessive attention to detail and human experience.

3.title: Resilient Infrastructure
3.label: infrastructure
3.desc: We build secure cloud foundations and automate processes. Environments upon which your business can grow without worry.

philosophy.label: Our approach
philosophy.heading: We reject mediocrity. We believe in digital craftsmanship.
philosophy.p1: Sokołek Studio is the collision of two worlds: rigorous engineering and artistic sensitivity. Maksymilian designs advanced systems and deploys AI. Klaudia is responsible for visual identity and photography.
philosophy.p2: We are a partnership in work and life. We do not take shortcuts or use pre-built templates. We design and code bespoke solutions with the highest care for every line of code and every pixel.
philosophy.caption: MAKS & KLAUDIA, FOUNDERS
philosophy.alt: Maks and Klaudia Sokołek, Founders of Sokołek Studio

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.heading: Let's build something together
contact.description: Tell us about your idea. Whether you need an AI-powered platform or a new identity for your brand.
